feed.title: i.webthings hub
feed.subtitle: i.webthings - an independent, noncommercial web initiative.

entry.title: “Discover the Small Web”
entry.content:
susam/wander: A tiny, decentralised tool you can host with just two files to explore the small web (see demo)
[ 📌cogdog ]

😎 What a cool idea!
entry.summary: susam/wander: A tiny, decentralised tool you can host with just two files to explore the small web (see demo)[ 📌cogdog ] 😎 What a cool idea!

entry.title: thanks mikael - this is cool!
entry.content:
CLIAMP (github)

A retro music player inspired by Winamp, built for the terminal. Spectrum visualizer, 10-band EQ, playlists, streaming, and more.

[ 📌mikael ]
entry.summary: CLIAMP (github) A retro music player inspired by Winamp, built for the terminal. Spectrum visualizer, 10-band EQ, playlists, streaming, and more. [ 📌mikael ]

entry.title: linkylove.webpath 04-03-26
entry.content:
• welcome to KAWAII! ☆ →
  • slice of love ♡ →
  • ma chérie →
  • Jay's Digital Diary →
  • Andi's Archive →
  • in the meantime we cry’s garden
entry.summary: welcome to KAWAII! ☆ → slice of love ♡ → ma chérie → Jay's Digital Diary → Andi's Archive → in the meantime we cry’s garden

entry.title: “technology that enables individual growth and collective flourishing”

link.title: “technology that enables individual growth and collective flourishing”

entry.content:
Resonant Computing Manifesto

And so, we find ourselves at this crossroads. Regardless of which path we choose, the future of computing will be hyper-personalized. The question is whether that personalization will be in service of keeping us passively glued to screens—wading around in the shallows, stripped of agency—or whether it will enable us to direct more attention to what matters.

[ 📌sdellis ]
entry.summary: Resonant Computing Manifesto And so, we find ourselves at this crossroads. Regardless of which path we choose, the future of computing will be hyper-personalized. The question is whether that personalization will be in service of keeping us passively glued to screens—wading around in the shallows, stripped of agency—or whether it will enable us to direct more attention to what matters. [ 📌sdellis ]

entry.title: twofer 03-31-26
entry.content:
• MOSS — A Painting Toy Where Every Brush Is a Tiny Program

    MOSS is a pixel editor with brushes that feel alive. Paint with tools that blend, spread, drip, grow, and glitch — each one behaving differently and each one completely customizable.

    [ 📌ftofani ]

  • DevToys - A Swiss Army knife for developers

    DevToys is free, open source and is privacy-focused on Windows, macOS and Linux! No need to use many untruthful websites to do simple tasks with your data.

    [ 📌thulstrup ]
entry.summary: MOSS — A Painting Toy Where Every Brush Is a Tiny Program MOSS is a pixel editor with brushes that feel alive. Paint with tools that blend, spread, drip, grow, and glitch — each one behaving differently and each one completely customizable. [ 📌ftofani ] DevToys - A Swiss Army knife for developers DevToys is free, open source and is privacy-focused on Windows, macOS and Linux! No need to use many untruthful websites to do simple tasks with your data. [ 📌thulstrup ]

  • HOMESTUCK LOL! →
  • boxy's totally tubular website! →
  • Essem →
  • notnite →
  • eva's site →
  • nullableVoid* →
  • wolfgirl.systems

entry.title: twofer 03-28-26
entry.content:
• Defuddle

    Get the main content of any page as clean, readable Markdown.

    [ 📌mikael + 📌tdjones ]

  • theSVG - ...for Developers and Designers

    Search, copy, and ship 5,645+ brand SVG icons. Free, open-source library with npm packages, React components, CLI, CDN, and MCP server. Tree-shakeable, typed, zero config.

    [ 📌vipom ]
entry.summary: Defuddle Get the main content of any page as clean, readable Markdown. [ 📌mikael + 📌tdjones ] theSVG - ...for Developers and Designers Search, copy, and ship 5,645+ brand SVG icons. Free, open-source library with npm packages, React components, CLI, CDN, and MCP server. Tree-shakeable, typed, zero config. [ 📌vipom ]

entry.title: mixed bag 03-26-26
entry.content:
• Tablecruncher

    This free and powerful CSV editor helps you crunch all your tabular data. On Windows, macOS and Linux.

    [ 📌cogdog ]

    Note: This is not an endorsement.

  • FontCrafter

    Turn your handwriting into an installable font — free, no account, no uploads. Works on every platform and the web. Print, write, scan, download.

    [ 📌richie5um ]

  • Famelack

    Watch free live world TV and listen to online radio stations from around the world. No account, no signup, no ads. Stream global news, music, and culture...

    [ 📌ideoforms ]

  • Timelinize - Everything at home

    Timelinize ("time-lynn-eyes") is an open source personal archival suite, designed for modern family history. It organizes all your data onto a single, unified timeline on your own computer.

    [ 📌mikael ]

    Note: This is not an endorsement.

  • Boing by GReg TeChnoLogY

    😮

    [ 📌roger ]
entry.summary: Tablecruncher This free and powerful CSV editor helps you crunch all your tabular data. On Windows, macOS and Linux. [ 📌cogdog ] Note: This is not an endorsement. FontCrafter Turn your handwriting into an installable font — free, no account, no uploads. Works on every platform and the web. Print, write, scan, download. [ 📌richie5um ] Famelack Watch free live world TV and listen to online radio stations from around the world. No account, no signup, no ads. Stream global news, music, and culture... [ 📌ideoforms ] Timelinize - Everything at home Timelinize ("time-lynn-eyes") is an open source personal archival suite, designed for modern family history. It organizes all your data onto a single, unified timeline on your own computer. [ 📌mikael ] Note: This is not an endorsement. Boing by GReg TeChnoLogY 😮 [ 📌roger ]

entry.title: twofer 03-24-26
entry.content:
• Miniroll - Your blogroll, anywhere

    Create, manage, and share your blogroll. Import from OPML, embed anywhere, discover others.

    [ 📌bradbarrish ]

  • cmux — The terminal built for multitasking (macOS) (github)

    Native macOS app built on Ghostty. Vertical tabs, notification rings when agents need attention, split panes, and a socket API for automation.

    [ 📌thulstrup ]

    Note: This is not an endorsement.
entry.summary: Miniroll - Your blogroll, anywhere Create, manage, and share your blogroll. Import from OPML, embed anywhere, discover others. [ 📌bradbarrish ] cmux — The terminal built for multitasking (macOS) (github) Native macOS app built on Ghostty. Vertical tabs, notification rings when agents need attention, split panes, and a socket API for automation. [ 📌thulstrup ] Note: This is not an endorsement.
